businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), Garena (gaming), and Monee (fintech) three-pillar ecosystem
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited operates e-commerce (Shopee), gaming (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) across Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Brazil. FY2025 revenue $22.94B, net income $1.58B. Tuesday close $89.17 (-1.03%). Despite strong Q4 2025 results (revenue $6.85B), flat 2026 guidance caused the worst earnings-day drop since IPO (-18%), with no recovery since. Market cap $52.79B. P/E 35.38x, Forward P/E 22.88x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Shopee (E-commerce): GMV-based commission + advertising — ~65% of revenue
Monee (Fintech): Digital payments, lending, insurance — ~25% of revenue
Garena (Gaming): Free Fire + licensed games — ~10% of revenue

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on EPS $2.52. Reasonable for e-commerce growth stock

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E. Historically cheap relative to growth rate

growthDrivers.title: Google AI Partnership → Shopee & Monee AI Innovation
growthDrivers.description: AI partnership with Google signed 2/19. Agentic AI shopping assistants for Shopee, AI-powered payments for Monee, AI gaming for Garena. Long-term growth catalyst.

growthDrivers.title: RSI 32.65 — Entering Oversold Territory
growthDrivers.description: Down -34% from 52-week high with RSI at 32.65 oversold. Seeking Alpha rates as 'Strong Buy opportunity.' Forward P/E 22.88x is attractive against +35% growth.

growthDrivers.title: Southeast Asian Digital Economy Structural Growth
growthDrivers.description: SEA internet economy growing toward $300B+. E-commerce penetration still low, providing long-term TAM expansion.

growthDrivers.title: Net Cash $7.24B + FCF $4.51B — Ample Investment Capacity
growthDrivers.description: Strong financial position enables aggressive investment during market downturns. Financial advantage over competitors.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: SEA e-commerce leader (Shopee) + fintech (Monee) + gaming (Garena) integrated ecosystem. Three-pillar synergy is the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee → ShopeePay → Monee lending closed loop. User lock-in.
World's most downloaded battle royale. User acquisition → Shopee/Monee cross-conversion.
Localized operations across 10+ countries. Deep understanding of SEA regulations and culture.

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: Ride-hailing → fintech → e-commerce expansion. Smaller scale relative to revenue

competitors.name: MercadoLibre (MELI)
competitors.detail: Latin American e-commerce leader. Competes with Shopee in Brazil

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: Alibaba's SEA e-commerce arm. No. 2 market share

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Rapid social commerce growth. Encroaching on Shopee's SEA market

recentNews.headline: SE -1.03% — post-earnings recovery continues to fail
recentNews.significance: Despite strong Q4, impact of disappointing 2026 guidance persists. -23% gap from 50-day SMA.

recentNews.headline: Sea Q4 2025 earnings: Revenue $6.85B, net income $397M — guidance disappoints
recentNews.significance: Revenue and profits solid, but flat 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance disappointed. Stock fell -18% (worst since IPO).

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Rare Strong Buy opportunity created by panic selloff'
recentNews.significance: Strong balance sheet ($8.73B net cash), solid revenue growth, and long-term macro tailwinds cited for Strong Buy upgrade.

recentNews.headline: Sea partners with Google on AI — introducing AI to Shopee & Monee
recentNews.significance: Agentic AI shopping assistants, AI-powered payments, AI gaming experience development collaboration. Long-term growth catalyst.

recentNews.headline: StockAnalysis: Strong Buy upgrade, year-end target $136
recentNews.significance: Post-selloff undervaluation recognized. Consolidated growth story intact.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 10 of 11 analysts rate Strong Buy. Average target $179.54 (+101% upside). MarketBeat $178.45. Extreme undervaluation consensus following panic selloff.

risks.title: 2026 Shopee EBITDA Flat Guidance — Margin Expansion Stalling
risks.description: Despite strong Q4, flat 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance disappointed the market. Price competition and investment expansion pressuring margins.

risks.title: Technical Downtrend After -18% Crash
risks.description: Worst single-day earnings decline since IPO. RSI 32.65 is oversold but -23% gap from 50-day SMA ($116) requires time for trend recovery.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition Intensifying
risks.description: TikTok Shop rapidly growing as social commerce in SEA. Risk of Shopee market share erosion.

risks.title: Southeast Asian Macro Risk
risks.description: Currency fluctuations, consumer slowdown, regulatory changes — inherent emerging market risks.

risks.title: Share Dilution +5.54% YoY
risks.description: High share count growth rate creating EPS dilution. Potential long-term shareholder value erosion.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 22.88x at +35% Growth — PEG 0.65
buyReasons.rationale: Panic selloff compressed Forward P/E to 22.88x. Attractive against +35% growth rate.

buyReasons.title: 10/11 Analysts Strong Buy — Target $179.54 (+101%)
buyReasons.rationale: Majority of experts project 2x upside. Extreme gap suggests selloff was excessive.

buyReasons.title: Google AI Partnership — Long-Term Growth Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Agentic AI shopping assistants and AI-powered payments to strengthen Shopee and Monee competitiveness.

buyReasons.title: RSI 32.65 Oversold + Net Cash $7.24B
buyReasons.rationale: Technically oversold with strong financial position. Limited downside risk with high bounce potential.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited closed at $89.17 (-1.03%), failing to recover from the -18% post-earnings crash despite strong Q4 2025 results (revenue $6.85B, net income $397M). The flat 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance continues to weigh.
Current stock is RSI 32.65 oversold, -23% below 50-day SMA, -40% below 200-day SMA. 10 of 11 analysts rate Strong Buy with average target $179.54 (+101%).

The key question is whether this is 'an opportunity created by panic' or 'the beginning of structural decline.' Given the Google AI partnership, $7.24B net cash, and +35% growth, the former seems more likely. However, TikTok Shop competition and margin pressure are real risks. Attractive entry point for investors who can tolerate near-term volatility.

sources.name: StockAnalysis
sources.description: SE close $89.17, P/E 35.38x, Forward P/E 22.88x, RSI 32.65

telegram.hook: 📉 SE $89.17 (-1.03%) — Panic Selloff vs Contrarian Opportunity
telegram.text:
Q4 revenue $6.85B, net income $397M were solid, but flat 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance triggered the worst earnings-day crash since IPO (-18%). No recovery since.

RSI 32.65 oversold, -23% below 50-day SMA, -40% below 200-day SMA. Yet 10 of 11 analysts rate Strong Buy, average target $179.54 (+101%).

Google AI partnership bringing agentic AI shopping assistants to Shopee. Net cash $7.24B.

If you can stomach volatility, this could be an attractive entry. Forward P/E 22.88x at +35% growth isn't bad at all.
